summary: Iteration 5 RETEST of Du' Spicci v4: all 4 previously-404 endpoints (SSE /api/events, extend, rate, user ratings) now fully functional. 100% pass.
passed: GET /api/events?token=<valid> -> 200 text/event-stream; receives 'ready' then 'message' event when other participant posts (verified live via threaded SSE listener while sending message)
POST /api/threads/{id}/extend call 3 after extension -> 400 'Già estesa una volta'
POST /api/threads/{id}/rate before expiry -> 400 'Puoi valutare solo dopo la scadenza della chat'
POST /api/threads/{id}/rate after force-expiring via mongo update -> 200, rating created with stars=4
POST /api/threads/{id}/rate duplicate from same user -> 400 'Hai già lasciato una valutazione'
Target user avg_rating updated to 4.0 and ratings_count=1 after rating
GET /api/users/{id}/ratings -> 200, returns list of 1 rating with correct schema
notes: SSE also delivered a 'thread_update' event during extend flow — bonus signal confirmed working. MongoDB used directly to force-expire thread for rating test (per problem statement). Setup: 2 fresh users registered, job posted, applied, accepted to create thread.
